title: Multi-board connect not showing item info in Chrome, desktop app
excerpt:

posts.author: AllysonDC (Allyson Rudolph)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! I’m experiencing a weird issue–thought I’d see if anyone else has encountered this before I escalate to support.
I have a multi-board connect column that currently has three boards connected. In Chrome and the desktop app, when I open the item card for a connected item, I don’t see the item info. But when I’m using Safari, I see what I’m supposed to see.
Obviously the workaround is to use Safari, but I’m curious if anyone else is having this issue, and whether there’s an easy fix.

posts.author: AllysonDC (Allyson Rudolph)
posts.cookedHtml: …and now it’s not working in Safari, either. I’m perplexed!
